api_key.description: NinjaOne RMM API bearer token. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: NinjaOne RMM API base URL override for tests, proxies, or a regional instance.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-1000) for paginated streams.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
